who: HR finance teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 reimbursement requests/month
offer: For HR finance teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 reimbursement requests/month, inaccurate tracking causes financial discrepancies. We provide a system for detecting anomalies instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate tracking of employee reimbursement requests
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR finance teams
Indie Hackers posts on relevant workflows
DM outreach to HR finance teams with demo video
Community forums where HR finance teams share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for 1-3 reimbursement requests
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with one-liner
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
